stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
You are about to depart for a commercial flight, with an aircraft having a flight crew of 7 members and 115 passengers. As part of your pre-flight calculations and given the following information, you need to calculate the Traffic Load in accordance with the standard passenger and baggage masses, as defined in the annex.

Flight crew: 4 male & 3 female
Male passengers: 70
Female passengers: 35
Children: 10
Baggage: 62 items
Standard mass for a flight crew member: 85 kg
Non-revenue load: 500 kg
